title: deverra triradiata subsp. intermedia
intro: Deverra triradiata subsp. intermedia, also known as the Intermediate Deverra, is a shrub-like plant native to the eastern parts of South Africa. It is known for its medicinal properties, with its roots and leaves being used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including the reduction of fever, relief from rheumatism, and the improvement of digestive issues. Deverra triradiata subsp. intermedia can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and roots in hot water, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
